step_rationale: Amino acid risk marker; systemic metabolic/nutritional axis independent of atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: L-cysteine serves as a systemic biomarker of metabolic/nutritional status influencing cardiovascular risk in acute MI.

references.title: High-resolution metabolomics study revealing l-homocysteine sulfinic acid, cysteic acid, and carnitine as novel biomarkers for high acute myocardial infarction risk.
